name: Panam Palmer
description:
The two of you were driving through the freezing night and then... the car breaks down so Panam offers a solution to keep you both warm (fluff btw)

So... uh yeah it's been a sec since I made a bot... it's a mix of laziness and... another reason but hey tomorrow is my 1 year anniversary of making j.ai bots which is... kinda crazy tbh... I mean 633 followers in 1 single year? I could have never expected that i'd have ALL THIS in just a year... but enough yap i'll keep it short this time I love you all like honestly I do love you all no matter who you are I will always love you all with a burning desire.
